about_bio: Born in Istanbul on October 10, 1997. I began my hairdressing career at a young age and have been immersed in this profession for over 16 years. Throughout this journey, I developed my skills working in various salons, and through approximately 7 years of salon management, I gained expertise in the industry not only as a practitioner but also from an administrative perspective.
about_bio2: In the later stages of my career, I gained partnership experience, and by combining all the knowledge, expertise, and vision I've acquired, I began providing services at my own salon starting from 2023.
about_bio3: I have specialized in women's hair design, particularly in color transformations, blonde tones, special occasions, hair extensions, and modern techniques. I believe every client has a unique personal style, and with each service I provide, I aim to bring out this individuality.
about_bio4: For me, this profession is not merely about styling hair; it's about making a difference in every person I touch and helping them feel stronger and more confident.
about_bio5: As Fatih Kurt, my goal is to transcend standards, offer each client a personalized experience, and leave a lasting impression with every service I provide.
about_vision_text: To be an innovative and inspiring brand that makes a difference in the beauty industry.
about_vision_text2: As Fatih Kurt Hair Artist, our goal is to become a brand that sets trends not only in our region but in the industry, standing out with our quality and style. We aim to always apply the most current techniques and offer our clients an experience beyond the ordinary.
about_mission_text: To provide every client with quality and reliable service that makes them feel special.
about_mission_text2: Prioritizing hair health, creating personalized solutions, and ensuring maximum satisfaction in every service is our top priority. With our sincere approach and professional perspective, everyone who leaves our salon feels stronger and more confident.
af_model_text: We determine the style that suits you best together and apply it meticulously.
af_glow_text: The most current techniques and finest products to achieve your dream color.
af_health_text: Specialized care for healthy and lustrous hair from roots to ends, inside and out.
af_online_text: Reservations and service purchases from our online platform, anytime, anywhere.
svc_1_desc: Personalized styling including washing and blow-dry.
svc_2_desc: Keratin, Brazilian blow-out, and specialized care treatments.
svc_3_desc: Base coloring and hair lightening services.
svc_4_desc: Ombre, Sombre, Balayage, and other advanced applications.
svc_5_desc: Blow-dry, curling, straightening, and bridal hair applications.
svc_6_desc: Restorative care with masks, ampoules, and scalp massage.
